mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO erp_production_order ( fid, bill_no, document_status, approver_id, approve_date, modifier_id, create_date, creator_id, modify_date, cancel_date, canceler, cancel_status, description, bill_type, trustteed, work_shop_id0, prd_org_id, planner_id, date, owner_type_id, owner_id, work_group_id, business_type, is_rework, is_entrust, en_trust_org_id, ppbom_type, issue_mtrl, is_qcmo, zghy_print_times, ukpt_zhrkrq, ukpt_zzllrq, ukpt_cjfs, ukpt_dlxm, xgbw_llts ) VALUES
( #{item.fid}, #{item.billNo}, #{item.documentStatus}, #{item.approverId}, #{item.approveDate}, #{item.modifierId}, #{item.createDate}, #{item.creatorId}, #{item.modifyDate}, #{item.cancelDate}, #{item.canceler}, #{item.cancelStatus}, #{item.description}, #{item.billType}, #{item.trustteed}, #{item.workShopId0}, #{item.prdOrgId}, #{item.plannerId}, #{item.date}, #{item.ownerTypeId}, #{item.ownerId}, #{item.workGroupId}, #{item.businessType}, #{item.isRework}, #{item.isEntrust}, #{item.enTrustOrgId}, #{item.ppbomType}, #{item.issueMtrl}, #{item.isQcmo}, #{item.zghyPrintTimes}, #{item.ukptZhrkrq}, #{item.ukptZzllrq}, #{item.ukptCjfs}, #{item.ukptDlxm}, #{item.xgbwLlts} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE bill_no = VALUES(bill_no), document_status = VALUES(document_status), approver_id = VALUES(approver_id), approve_date = VALUES(approve_date), modifier_id = VALUES(modifier_id), create_date = VALUES(create_date), creator_id = VALUES(creator_id), modify_date = VALUES(modify_date), cancel_date = VALUES(cancel_date), canceler = VALUES(canceler), cancel_status = VALUES(cancel_status), description = VALUES(description), bill_type = VALUES(bill_type), trustteed = VALUES(trustteed), work_shop_id0 = VALUES(work_shop_id0), prd_org_id = VALUES(prd_org_id), planner_id = VALUES(planner_id), date = VALUES(date), owner_type_id = VALUES(owner_type_id), owner_id = VALUES(owner_id), work_group_id = VALUES(work_group_id), business_type = VALUES(business_type), is_rework = VALUES(is_rework), is_entrust = VALUES(is_entrust), en_trust_org_id = VALUES(en_trust_org_id), ppbom_type = VALUES(ppbom_type), issue_mtrl = VALUES(issue_mtrl), is_qcmo = VALUES(is_qcmo), zghy_print_times = VALUES(zghy_print_times), ukpt_zhrkrq = VALUES(ukpt_zhrkrq), ukpt_zzllrq = VALUES(ukpt_zzllrq), ukpt_cjfs = VALUES(ukpt_cjfs), ukpt_dlxm = VALUES(ukpt_dlxm), xgbw_llts = VALUES(xgbw_llts)
